engine.ladder_reasoning: Visitor is checking out a physical bookstore — store news, curated shelf picks, in-store events, best-seller ranking, locations and hours are the decision; browsing the place's offerings IS what closes the visit, so place beats work/thing.

goal.one_action: Get visitors to know the shop and either visit a branch or hop to the online bookstore

structure.archetype_note: Brochure hub for a small independent bookstore with multiple branches/sub-brands; home is a store-news + recommendations + events + ranking feed; commerce is offloaded to an external shop subdomain.

mapped.observed_as: 店主挨拶 / 代表（大井実）プロフィール
会社概要 (company overview) / ブックスキューブリック10の常識
お問合せ (form under adjustment, email fallback)

unmapped.why_no_fit: A dated store-news feed on home; no canonical id for a running news/announcements list

unmapped.observed: KUBRICK Recommendations (8 featured books w/ title, author, publisher)
unmapped.why_no_fit: Curated own-inventory showcase grid, not marketing features or portfolio proof

unmapped.observed: Events (upcoming talk events & art exhibitions with dates)
unmapped.why_no_fit: Dated in-store event schedule; no canonical section for event listings

unmapped.observed: Best Sellers Ranking (top-10 books w/ yen prices, table)
unmapped.why_no_fit: Priced ranked product list without cart; not pricing tiers, not results/stats

proposed_new.name: event-listings
proposed_new.evidence: Home 'Events' section lists dated in-store talk events and art exhibitions — a standing dated schedule the closed vocab cannot express

proposed_new.name: practitioner-profiles
proposed_new.evidence: Nav exposes per-branch/sub-brand pages (けやき通り店, 箱崎店, CAFE&GALLERY, BK BAKERY) — each location/sub-brand gets its own detail page, the multi-branch pattern

design_style.none_fits_because: No design hints captured (empty fonts/colors, dark_or_light null); cannot judge visual style from the raw record

confidence.why: fetch_quality is full but only 3 of 11 pages captured (branch/shop/cafe/careers pages missing, one guessed URL 404'd) and design hints are empty — engine/place read is clear, but structure and design detail are partial

gap_findings: No canonical section for a dated store-news feed or an in-store event schedule (both live on the home page here).
A priced, ranked own-inventory list (best-seller ranking) with no on-site cart has no clean home in the section list or capability vocab — 'catalog' implies browse but not ranking/curation.

Multi-branch / multi-sub-brand place businesses (bookstore + cafe/gallery + bakery, two locations) aren't expressible: closed vocab has no location-hub/branch-profiles concept — maps onto proposed practitioner-profiles.
Primary conversion is an external shop redirect while the contact form is disabled — the on-site job is diffuse (know us / visit / shop off-site), straining the 'one conversion action' framing.
